items.title: Platform as a Product: Delivering Value While Balancing Competing Priorities
items.summaryShort: Platform as a Product: Delivering Value While Balancing Competing Priorities. Software platforms must be treated as products.

items.title: Cursor 3 Introduces Agent-First Interface, Moving Beyond the IDE Model
items.summaryShort: Cursor 3 Introduces Agent-First Interface, Moving Beyond the IDE Model. Anysphere released Cursor 3, a redesigned interface built from scratch that shifts the primary model from file editing to managing parallel coding agents.

items.title: OpenTelemetry Declarative Configuration Reaches Stability Milestone
items.summaryShort: OpenTelemetry Declarative Configuration Reaches Stability Milestone. The OpenTelemetry project has announced that key portions of its declarative configuration specification have reached stable status.

items.title: Google’s TurboQuant Compression May Support Faster Inference, Same Accuracy on Less Capable Hardware
items.summaryShort: Google’s TurboQuant Compression May Support Faster Inference, Same Accuracy on Less Capable Hardware. Google Research unveiled TurboQuant, a novel quantization algorithm that compresses large language models’ Key-Value caches by up to 6x.

items.title: Presentation: Empower Your Developers: How Open Source Dependencies Risk Management Can Unlock Innovation
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Empower Your Developers: How Open Source Dependencies Risk Management Can Unlock Innovation. Celine Pypaert discusses the ubiquitous nature of open-source software and shares a blueprint for securing modern applications.

items.title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
items.summaryShort: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage. Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively.

items.title: Canva's AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
items.summaryShort: Canva's AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you. The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

items.title: Fashion retailer Express left customers' personal data and order details exposed to the internet
items.summaryShort: Fashion retailer Express left customers' personal data and order details exposed to the internet. Retail giant Express was publicly spilling customer information to the open web.
